sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63237" key="liqoyh/kths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λῐθο-ψήκτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ψήχω</etym>) <sense id="n63237.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">stone-polisher,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cat.Cod.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(4).216</biblScope> </bibl> (-<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ψύκτ</foreign>- cod.).</sense> </entryFree>
